docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANG, SHINI AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, CATHRYN AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
